languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

languages.text: "Согласно букве Лекс Империалис, отсутствие подтверждающего документа отнимает у Вольного Торговца право называться таковым. Статус миров, уже завоеванных династией, при этом... неоднозначен".

"According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

"According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

languages.text: 「帝国法典の文字どおり、支援文書がないとローグトレーダーを名乗る権利は失われる。すでにこの王朝によって征服された惑星の現状は...は不明だ。」
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国法典の文字どおり、支援文書がないとローグトレーダーを名乗る権利は失われる。すでにこの王朝によって征服された惑星の現状は...は不明だ。」

languages.text: « D'après la Lex Imperialis, en l'absence de document officiel attestant de sa position, un libre-marchand perd le droit de se considérer comme tel. Le statut des mondes déjà conquis par la dynastie, cependant, est... ambigu. »
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

traits.locale_text: « D'après la Lex Imperialis, en l'absence de document officiel attestant de sa position, un libre-marchand perd le droit de se considérer comme tel. Le statut des mondes déjà conquis par la dynastie, cependant, est... ambigu. »

languages.text: "Das Lex Imperia besagt, dass man durch das Fehlen eines entsprechenden Dokumentes das Recht verliert, sich als {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} zu bezeichnen. Wohingegen der Status bereits von der Dynastie unterworfener Welten ... unklar ist."
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

traits.locale_text: "Das Lex Imperia besagt, dass man durch das Fehlen eines entsprechenden Dokumentes das Recht verliert, sich als {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} zu bezeichnen. Wohingegen der Status bereits von der Dynastie unterworfener Welten ... unklar ist."

languages.text: "Lex İmperialis'in lafzına göre destekleyici bir belgenin yokluğu, kişinin kendisini Hür Tacir olarak adlandırma hakkını iptal eder. Hanedan tarafından hâlihazırda fethedilmiş dünyaların statüsü ise... Belirsizdir."
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

traits.locale_text: "Lex İmperialis'in lafzına göre destekleyici bir belgenin yokluğu, kişinin kendisini Hür Tacir olarak adlandırma hakkını iptal eder. Hanedan tarafından hâlihazırda fethedilmiş dünyaların statüsü ise... Belirsizdir."

languages.text: «Según lo estipulado por la Lex Imperialis, la ausencia de un documento que avale el cargo supone la revocación del derecho del individuo a considerarse Comerciante Independiente. La situación de los mundos que ya hayan sido conquistados por la dinastía, por otro lado, es... un tanto incierta».
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."

traits.locale_text: «Según lo estipulado por la Lex Imperialis, la ausencia de un documento que avale el cargo supone la revocación del derecho del individuo a considerarse Comerciante Independiente. La situación de los mundos que ya hayan sido conquistados por la dinastía, por otro lado, es... un tanto incierta».

languages.text: “依据《帝国法典》的条文，若缺少贸易授权，便无权再自称为行商浪人。至于王朝已征服的世界……其法律地位尚不明确。”
languages.original_text: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."
